name: RebarSet.FrozenStateEnum
summary: Represents the frozen state of the rebar set.

enum_values.name: NOT_FROZEN
enum_values.summary: No leg faces or surface in the rebar set is frozen.

enum_values.name: FULLY_FROZEN
enum_values.summary: All of the leg faces and surfaces of the rebar set are frozen.

enum_values.name: PARTIALLY_FROZEN
enum_values.summary: Some, but not all of the leg faces and surfaces of the rebar set are frozen.
